chunks.en: First I check the weather to see if it's hot or cold.
chunks.ja: まず天気を見て、暑いか寒いかを確かめます。

chunks.en: When it's cold outside, I always wear a warm jacket.
chunks.ja: 外が寒いときは、いつも暖かいジャケットを着ます。

chunks.en: How I pick my clothes depends on my plans for the day.
chunks.ja: 服の選び方は、その日の予定によって変わります。

chunks.en: On work days, I choose a clean shirt and simple pants.
chunks.ja: 仕事の日は、きれいなシャツとシンプルなズボンを選びます。

chunks.en: My favorite thing to wear is a soft and comfortable hoodie.
chunks.ja: 私のお気に入りは、柔らかくて楽なパーカーです。

chunks.en: Sometimes it takes a long time because I can't decide.
chunks.ja: 時々、決められなくて時間がかかることがあります。

outline: Opening: I check the weather first
Point 1: I pick clothes by my daily plans
Wrap-up: Some days it's hard to decide

modelTalk.text: Every morning, I think about what to wear. First I check the weather. I look outside, or I check my phone. Is it hot or cold today? Will it rain? That helps me a lot. Next I think about my day. If I go to work, I wear something nice and clean. If it's my day off, I just want to feel comfy. My favorite thing is a big soft sweater. I also love my old jeans and easy shoes. They're simple, and I feel good in them. But some days are hard. I can't decide, and I try many things. I put on a shirt, then I take it off. Time goes by, and I'm still not ready. On those days, I just pick something easy. In the end, comfy clothes always make me happy. What do you wear?

chunks.en: First I check the weather to see if it's hot or cold outside.
chunks.ja: まず外が暑いか寒いか確かめるために天気をチェックします。

chunks.en: How I pick my clothes really depends on my plans for the day.
chunks.ja: どんな服を選ぶかは、その日の予定によって本当に変わります。

chunks.en: On work days I usually wear a plain shirt and comfortable pants.
chunks.ja: 仕事の日はたいてい無地のシャツと楽なズボンをはきます。

chunks.en: My favorite thing to wear is an old hoodie because it feels so relaxing.
chunks.ja: お気に入りは古いパーカーで、着ているととても落ち着くからです。

chunks.en: Sometimes it takes a long time when I can't decide between two options.
chunks.ja: 二つの選択肢で迷って決められないときは、時々とても時間がかかります。

outline: Opening: I check the weather first
Point 1: pick clothes based on the day's plans
Wrap-up: some days deciding takes a long time

modelTalk.text: Every morning, the first thing I do is check the weather. I want to know if it'll be hot or cold outside. Then I think about my day. If I'm working, I pick something a bit smarter, like a shirt. But if it's my day off, I just go for comfy clothes. My favorite thing to wear is an old hoodie. It's soft and warm, and it goes with almost everything. I put it on and I feel relaxed straight away. Some days, though, I really can't make up my mind. I try on one thing, then take it off and try another. Before I know it, ten minutes have gone by. When that happens, I just grab my jeans and a plain T-shirt. In the end, being comfortable matters more than looking perfect, so I stop worrying.
